candidate_mapping_themes_top.label: technical lead at seven.one entertainment group: strongest match for hands-on leadership, cross-functional delivery, and shaping engineering practices.
commander-4: best proof of shipping a scalable product platform with quality controls, evaluation, and guardrails under real user load.
lantern llm gateway and prior microservices / cqrs work: supports claims around architecture, reliability, and system design.

commander-4 maps well because it shows ownership of a production ai platform with 42 plugins, 2,000 users, rag, semantic caching, evaluation, and guardrails, which is strong evidence for scaling and operating a platform.
lantern maps well because multi-provider routing and circuit breaker work is directly relevant to service reliability, platform resilience, and operational engineering.

the seven.one entertainment group technical lead role and earlier microservices / rabbitmq and cqrs / event-sourcing work are the best evidence for cross-functional engineering support and distributed-systems thinking.
commander-4 maps to platform ownership, reliability, and scaling an ai workflow system with guardrails and evaluation.
lantern maps to resilient platform design through multi-provider routing and circuit breaking, which is relevant to operating production services.
